response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON lyrics for the first verse. I am discarding the incomplete JSON reference for the remainder of the video and transcribing the full song cover of 'Bitachoco Decoration' and the subsequent English dialogue. Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal audio cues, with Japanese lyrics translated into English and English dialogue transcribed for both fields.

subtitles.original: 人を過度に信じないように
subtitles.english: I try not to have too much faith in people

subtitles.original: 愛さないように期待しないように
subtitles.english: Not to love, not to have expectations

subtitles.original: かと言って角が立たないように
subtitles.english: But at the same time, I try not to be confrontational

subtitles.original: 気取らぬように目立たぬように
subtitles.english: I try not to be pretentious, try not to stand out

subtitles.original: 誰一人傷つけぬように
subtitles.english: I try not to hurt anyone

subtitles.original: 虐めぬように殺さぬように
subtitles.english: I try not to bully, not to kill

subtitles.original: かと言って角が立たないように
subtitles.english: But at the same time, I try not to be confrontational

subtitles.original: 軽いトークやリップサービスも忘れぬように
subtitles.english: Not to forget small talk and lip service

subtitles.original: どんな時も笑って愛嬌振りまくように
subtitles.english: Always smiling and showing some charm

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: とやかく言わずにたんと召し上がれ
subtitles.english: Don't say this or that, just eat up

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 食わず嫌いはちゃんと直さなきゃ
subtitles.english: You have to fix your pickiness

subtitles.original: 頭空っぽそのあとに
subtitles.english: After your head is empty

subtitles.original: 残る心が本物なら
subtitles.english: If the heart that remains is real

subtitles.original: きっと君だって同じこと
subtitles.english: Surely even you would do the same

subtitles.original: どこかでそっと伺いますが
subtitles.english: I'll gently ask you somewhere

subtitles.original: 演じてるならやばいな
subtitles.english: If you're acting, that's bad

subtitles.original: 無駄に自我を晒さないように
subtitles.english: Don't expose your ego unnecessarily

subtitles.original: 話さないように分からないように
subtitles.english: Don't talk, don't let them understand

subtitles.original: 酔わせて口を閉ざさないように
subtitles.english: Don't let them drink and shut their mouths

subtitles.original: 笑わすよりは笑われるように
subtitles.english: Try to be laughed at rather than making them laugh

subtitles.original: 人をちゃんと敬うように
subtitles.english: Respect people properly

subtitles.original: 崇めるように称えるように
subtitles.english: Worship them, praise them

subtitles.original: でも決して闇にならないように
subtitles.english: But never let it become darkness

subtitles.original: ふざけないように
subtitles.english: Don't mess around

subtitles.original: 集団参加の終身刑
subtitles.english: Life sentence of group participation

subtitles.original: まだへれこへれこ言っちゃって
subtitles.english: Still saying things so playfully

subtitles.original: あれ前髪調整最強じゃん
subtitles.english: Isn't that bangs adjustment the best?

subtitles.original: ぶっちゃけどうでもいいのに言っちゃって
subtitles.english: To be honest, I say it even though I don't care

subtitles.original: 毎朝毎晩もう限界
subtitles.english: Every morning, every night, I'm at my limit

subtitles.original: 宗教的社会の集団に
subtitles.english: To the group of religious society

subtitles.original: 順応して発狂しないように
subtitles.english: Adapt and try not to go crazy

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 時には孤独な愛を君を汚す
subtitles.english: Sometimes lonely love stains you

subtitles.original: 立つ鳥の跡きっとクソの跡

subtitles.original: いやはやはや好きのうち
subtitles.english: Well, while you still like it

subtitles.english: Well, but today is the first time

subtitles.original: こんなのは君センスあるよ
